title: MaxPool invalid window causes CPU floating point exception

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Use a MaxPool1D pool size larger than the input length with padding='valid'.
expected: TensorFlow should consistently reject invalid pooling dimensions on CPU and GPU.
observed: GPU does not crash; CPU terminates with Floating point exception.
